operational_knowledge_units.title: RobotLocationDatabaseModel stores robot location attributes and control parameters
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the RobotLocationDatabaseModel table contains information about locations, including station number, occupancy, zone, close out zone, location type, maximum number of AGVs allowed at a location, and whether dwell time tracking is enabled.
observed_evidence: The RobotLocationDatabaseModel table contains all the information about the locations

including the station number, whether it is occupied or not, zone, its close out zone, the location type, the max number of agvs allowed at that location, and whether the location should be tracked for dwell time.

relationships.target: zone and close out zone assignment

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: RobotLocationDatabaseModel table reference. Stores robot location data including station number, occupied status, zone, close out zone, location type, max AGVs allowed at the location, and whether dwell time should be tracked.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Robot location types enumerated in RobotLocationDatabaseModel
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide provides a list of location types used in the robot location database model.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robot location types in RobotLocationDatabaseModel include Sorter, SorterEntranceQueue, SorterQueue, SorterExitQueue, Tipper, TipperQueue, TipperExitQueue, HospitalDropOff, HospitalEntranceQueue, HospitalPickup, HospitalExitQueue, ShutDownOffTheEnd, ShutDownQueue, GLDPreQueueEntrance, and GLDPreQueueExit.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Robot location records include enablement status values
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies the location status values associated with robot locations: Enabled, Stopped, and Disabled.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robot location status values shown on the slide are Enabled, Stopped, and Disabled. These statuses are part of the robot location database model context.

discarded_candidates.title: Manage or update robot location records
discarded_candidates.reason: The slide describes database fields, enumerated location types, and location statuses, but does not provide explicit action steps or a reusable operational sequence.
